blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,300 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
